Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
import time
from sqlmodel import select
from scholarforge.store.db import get_session
from scholarforge.store.models import Paper, Chunk
from scholarforge.vault.linker import link_all_papers

with get_session\(\) as session:
    papers = session.exec\(select\(Paper\)\).all\(\)
    papers_with_text = []
    for paper in papers:
        chunks = session.exec\(select\(Chunk\).where\(Chunk.paper_id == paper.id\)\).all\(\)
        full_text = '\\n\\n'.join\(c.content for c in chunks\)
        papers_with_text.append\(\(paper, full_text\)\)

t0 = time.time\(\)
stats = link_all_papers\(papers_with_text\)
print\(f'Linking: {stats} in {time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
from sqlmodel import select
from scholarforge.store.db import get_session
from scholarforge.store.models import Paper, Chunk
from scholarforge.vault.linker import link_all_papers

with get_session\(\) as session:
    papers = session.exec\(select\(Paper\)\).all\(\)
    papers_with_text = []
    for paper in papers:
        chunks = session.exec\(select\(Chunk\).where\(Chunk.paper_id == paper.id\)\).all\(\)
        full_text = '\\n\\n'.join\(c.content for c in chunks\)
        papers_with_text.append\(\(paper, full_text\)\)

stats = link_all_papers\(papers_with_text\)
print\(f'Linked: {stats}'\)

import os
for d in ['topics', 'methods']:
    p = f'data/vault/{d}'
    if os.path.exists\(p\):
        print\(f'  {d}/: {len\(os.listdir\(p\)\)} notes'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
from sqlmodel import select
from scholarforge.store.db import get_session
from scholarforge.store.models import Paper
import json
with get_session\(\) as s:
    for p in s.exec\(select\(Paper\)\).all\(\):
        authors = json.loads\(p.authors\)
        print\(f'{p.year} | {authors[:3]} | abstract: {bool\(p.abstract\)} | {p.title[:60]}'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
from pathlib import Path
import re

vault = Path\('data/vault'\)
papers = list\(\(vault / 'papers'\).glob\('*.md'\)\)
print\(f'Paper notes: {len\(papers\)}'\)
print\(f'Topic notes: {len\(list\(\(vault / \\"topics\\"\).glob\(\\"*.md\\"\)\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Method notes: {len\(list\(\(vault / \\"methods\\"\).glob\(\\"*.md\\"\)\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Author notes: {len\(list\(\(vault / \\"authors\\"\).glob\(\\"*.md\\"\)\)\)}'\)

has_topic = has_similar = has_figure_ref = has_abstract = 0
for p in papers:
    content = p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)
    if 'hasTopic:' in content: has_topic += 1
    if 'similar_to:' in content: has_similar += 1
    if '## Figure References' in content: has_figure_ref += 1
    if '## Abstract' in content: has_abstract += 1

print\(f'\\\\nSignal coverage \(out of {len\(papers\)}\):'\)
print\(f'  hasTopic:        {has_topic}'\)
print\(f'  similar_to:      {has_similar}'\)
print\(f'  Figure Refs:     {has_figure_ref}'\)
print\(f'  Abstract:        {has_abstract}'\)
print\(f'  cites_same:      0 \(expected: only 20 papers, coupling threshold=2\)'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
import pymupdf4llm, fitz
from scholarforge.extract.metadata import extract_metadata

papers = [
    'data/papers/mvp20/[2014 Gao] Ultra-Low-Energy Three-Dimensional Oxide-Based Electronic Synapses for Implementation of Robust High-Accuracy Neuromorphic Computation Systems.pdf',
    'data/papers/mvp20/[2018 Yang] Memristor Crossbar Arrays for Analog and Neuromorphic Computing.pdf',
    'data/papers/mvp20/[1971 Chua] Memristor-The_missing_circuit_element.pdf',
    'data/papers/mvp20/[2018 Li] In-Memory Computing with Memristor Arrays.pdf',
    'data/papers/mvp20/[2011 Yang] Dopant Control by Atomic Layer Deposition in Oxide Films for Memristive Switches.pdf',
    'data/papers/mvp20/[2019 Jeong] Memristor devices for neural networks.pdf',
]
for p in papers:
    md = pymupdf4llm.to_markdown\(p\)
    doc = fitz.open\(p\)
    meta = extract_metadata\(doc, md, p.split\('/'\)[-1]\)
    doc.close\(\)
    ab = meta['abstract']
    preview = \(ab[:80] + '...'\) if ab and len\(ab\) > 80 else ab
    print\(f'Authors: {meta[\\"authors\\"][:3]}'\)
    print\(f'Abstract: {bool\(ab\)} | {preview}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
import pymupdf4llm, fitz
from scholarforge.extract.metadata import extract_metadata
from pathlib import Path

mvp = Path\('data/papers/mvp20'\)
for p in sorted\(mvp.glob\('*.pdf'\)\):
    md = pymupdf4llm.to_markdown\(str\(p\)\)
    doc = fitz.open\(str\(p\)\)
    meta = extract_metadata\(doc, md, p.name\)
    doc.close\(\)
    ab = meta['abstract']
    authors = meta['authors'][:3]
    has_ab = bool\(ab\)
    preview = \(ab[:90] + '...'\) if ab and len\(ab\) > 90 else \(ab or 'NONE'\)
    print\(f'[{meta[\\"year\\"]} {authors[0] if authors else \\"?\\"}] ab={has_ab} | {preview}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
from pathlib import Path
vault = Path\('data/vault'\)
papers = list\(\(vault / 'papers'\).glob\('*.md'\)\)
has_topic = has_similar = has_figure_ref = has_abstract = 0
for p in papers:
    c = p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)
    if 'hasTopic:' in c: has_topic += 1
    if 'similar_to:' in c: has_similar += 1
    if '## Figure References' in c: has_figure_ref += 1
    if '## Abstract' in c: has_abstract += 1
print\(f'Papers: {len\(papers\)}'\)
print\(f'hasTopic:    {has_topic}/{len\(papers\)}'\)
print\(f'similar_to:  {has_similar}/{len\(papers\)}'\)
print\(f'Figure refs: {has_figure_ref}/{len\(papers\)}'\)
print\(f'Abstract:    {has_abstract}/{len\(papers\)}'\)
")

for name, path in [
    \('Adam', 'data/papers/mvp20/[2017 Adam] 3-D Memristor Crossbars for Analog and Neuromorphic Computing Applications.pdf'\),
    \('Ghoneim', 'data/papers/mvp20/[2014 Ghoneim] Foldable neuromorphic memristive electronics.pdf'\),
    \('Jo', 'data/papers/mvp20/[2010 Jo] Nanoscale-memristor-device-as-synapse-in-neuromorphic-systems.pdf'\),
]:

    print\(f'=== {name} ==='\)
    for line in text.split\('\\n'\)[:15]:
        print\(repr\(line\)\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -c "
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
vault = Path\('data/vault'\)
for p in sorted\(\(vault / 'papers'\).glob\('*.md'\)\):
    c = p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\).split\('---', 2\)
    if len\(c\) >= 3:
        fm = yaml.safe_load\(c[1]\)
        t = [x.replace\('[[topics/',''\).rstrip\(']]'\) for x in fm.get\('hasTopic', []\)]
        print\(f'{p.stem[:50]:50s} | {t}'\)
")
